# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

# EXTERNAL cache entries

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the

//Have the library compile as C++20
FASTGLTF_COMPILE_AS_CPP20:BOOL=ON

//Disables the memory allocation algorithm based on polymorphic
// resources
FASTGLTF_DISABLE_CUSTOM_MEMORY_POOL:BOOL=OFF

//Enables the benchmark usage of assimp
FASTGLTF_ENABLE_ASSIMP:BOOL=OFF

//Enables support for deprecated extensions
FASTGLTF_ENABLE_DEPRECATED_EXT:BOOL=OFF

//Enables the configuration of targets that build/generate documentation
FASTGLTF_ENABLE_DOCS:BOOL=OFF

//Enables example targets for fastgltf
FASTGLTF_ENABLE_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Enables the benchmark usage of gltf-rs
FASTGLTF_ENABLE_GLTF_RS:BOOL=OFF

//Enables test targets for fastgltf
FASTGLTF_ENABLE_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Default to 64-bit double precision floats for everything
FASTGLTF_USE_64BIT_FLOAT:BOOL=OFF

//Uses a custom SmallVector type optimised for small arrays
FASTGLTF_USE_CUSTOM_SMALLVECTOR:BOOL=OFF

//Directory under which to collect all populated content
FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR:PATH=/home/runner/workspace/pacengine/build_render/_deps

//Disables all attempts to download or update content and assumes
// source dirs already exist
FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables QUIET option for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_QUIET:BOOL=ON

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for fastgltf
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_FASTGLTF:PATH=

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of fastgltf
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_FASTGLTF:BOOL=OFF

//Build PacEngine render layer (M2.5, requires C++20)

//Build PacEngine tests
PACENGINE_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF
